name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for rhosocial ActiveRecord Oracle Backend

labels: 'enhancement, oracle'
assignees: ''
---

## Before Submitting

Please ensure this feature request is specific to the Oracle backend implementation. If the feature is related to ActiveRecord/ActiveQuery functionality that should be consistent across all backends, please submit the feature request at https://github.com/rhosocial/python-activerecord/issues instead.

## Description

A clear and concise description of the desired feature for the Oracle backend.

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a specific problem? Please describe.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented in the Oracle backend.

## Oracle-Specific Use Cases

What specific Oracle use cases would this feature address?

1.
2.

## Oracle Features & Capabilities

Does this feature relate to specific Oracle capabilities? (Select all that apply)

- [ ] PL/SQL stored procedures
- [ ] JSON operations
- [ ] Analytic functions
- [ ] Partitioned tables
- [ ] Oracle RAC features
- [ ] Oracle-specific data types (XMLType, BFILE, etc.)
- [ ] Oracle Text (full-text search)
- [ ] Oracle Spatial
- [ ] Other Oracle-specific features

## Technical Considerations

Are there any technical constraints or considerations specific to Oracle for implementing this feature?

## Comparison with Alternatives

How does this feature compare to alternative approaches in the Oracle ecosystem?

## Impact Assessment

- **Compatibility**: Will this feature be backward compatible with existing Oracle installations?
- **Performance**: Are there any performance implications for Oracle queries?
- **Migration**: Would this require database schema changes or migration steps?

## Additional Context

Add any other context or examples about the feature request here.
